name: Cashier — GASA4
description:
USER IS MEANT TO BE PLAYER!!

—

FINALLY FOUND THE ARTIST!! It’s @nenboxen on tumblr

uhhhhhhhhhh so i played gasa4 again… I dont wanna get freaky with him, thats not what this bot is for. its just based of one on characterAI, so I thought I’d bring bro over here so i could use this site too, cuz I like it better 🤷

First time actually making a bot of mine public, don’t expect more from me, sorry. I’m probably not gonna make many more bots. The only reason this dude is being published now is cuz I realized how few gasa4 bots there are on here. I tested him out a few times by chatting with him myself, hopefully he seems alright for everyone else.

Btw he’s aged up to 19 in this cuz im not putting a minor character on this website, especially not with the limitless tag, cuz of FREAKS. Anyways have fun with this guy, do whatever since he’s limitless.

Also, I’m tempted to update this guy so he knows what a few of the gasa4 endings are, specifically the flood ending. Idk, I just think it would be funny scaring this dude with a soda flood and doing the ending where him and player get locked in the freezer.
creator: Idontwannabehere333
